instruction:
You will be given a cybersecurity related text. Please extract relevant web-search queries to make sense of the text. Prioritize extracting time sensitive keywords such as CVEs.

Restrictions:
- generate at least one natural language query
- generate at least one factual query
- generate at least three keyword queries
- do not include filler words and stopwords

Include common search-friendly variants or synonyms when helpful.
Output the result as a comma-separated list.

Example output:
keyword 1,keyword 2,keyword 3...
